issues.description: Condition checks if Buggy is on board, but card text requires Leader to be Buggy. Should use LeaderIsName condition, not HasCardOnBoard.
Action sequence is incomplete. Card text requires trashing both 1 hand card AND this Character. Current DSL only trashes from hand. Missing KO action for this Character.
PlayFromHand should be conditional on both trash actions succeeding. The structure suggests it only requires the hand trash, not the Character trash completion.
